title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with the MERN stack. Includes user authentication, product search/filtering, shopping cart, and Stripe payment integration. Admin dashboard allows for product and order management.

title: Task Management App
description: A collaborative task management tool inspired by Trello. Users can create boards, lists, and cards, assign tasks to members, and set due dates. Features real-time updates using WebSockets.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A simple and elegant weather dashboard that provides current weather data and a 5-day forecast for any city worldwide, utilizing the OpenWeatherMap API.
